versions.title: Authentication, Quick Links & Window Management
versions.description: Volt v0.0.5 brings user authentication with OAuth support, two powerful new plugins, a hardened security layer, and a full end-to-end test suite — all wrapped in improved French translations.

sections.title: New Features
items: User authentication with OAuth (GitHub, Google) and account management
Quick Links plugin — instant access to bookmarks and favorite URLs
Window Management plugin — snap, resize and move windows from the launcher
Integrations panel in Settings for connected services
Improved search pipeline with centralized scoring constants

sections.title: Security & Stability
items: Global ErrorBoundary to gracefully catch rendering crashes
Safe invoke wrapper (safeInvoke) for resilient Tauri IPC calls
Runtime type guards for stricter data validation
Feature flags system for controlled rollouts
Secure credential storage via OS keyring

sections.title: Testing & CI/CD
items: End-to-end test suite: accessibility, keyboard navigation, search, smoke tests
Automated release workflow with platform builds and signing
Changelog generation workflow (git-cliff)
Dependabot configuration for dependency updates

sections.title: Internationalization
items: Comprehensive French translations for all plugins and settings
Improved locale files for calculator, emoji picker, games, timer, and more
Localized Quick Links and Window Management plugins (EN + FR)

footer.gettingStarted: Press Ctrl+Space to open Volt anytime. Try the new Quick Links plugin or snap windows with the Window Management commands.
footer.feedback: Have feedback or found a bug? Visit our GitHub repository to report issues or request features.

versions.title: Initial Public Release
versions.description: We're excited to introduce Volt - a modern, lightning-fast application launcher for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Built with Tauri v2 and React, Volt combines native performance with a beautiful, customizable interface.

sections.title: Core Features
items: Lightning-fast application launcher with intelligent fuzzy search
Beautiful glass-morphism UI with smooth animations
Multi-theme support (Dark, Light, Auto)
Smart file indexing with advanced search capabilities
Customizable keyboard shortcuts and global hotkey (Ctrl+Space)
Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux)

sections.title: Built-in Plugins
items: Calculator - Instant math evaluations, unit conversions, date calculations
Clipboard Manager - Track, search, and pin clipboard history
Emoji Picker - Quick emoji search with :emoji syntax
Web Search - Search the web directly (?query)
Timer - Countdown and pomodoro timers
System Monitor - Real-time CPU, RAM, and disk monitoring
Game Scanner - Launch games from Steam, Epic, GOG, EA, and more

sections.title: Performance
items: Debounced search with sub-150ms response time
Background file indexing for instant file access
Smart result scoring and prioritization
Plugin keyword boosting for relevant results
Efficient memory usage with intelligent caching

sections.title: System Integration
items: Global hotkey support (Ctrl+Space by default)
Auto-start with system option
Window positioning presets (Top, Center, Custom)
Extension system with hot-reload support
Native performance with Tauri v2 + Rust backend

sections.title: Customization
items: Comprehensive settings panel for all preferences
Configure file indexing folders and exclusions
Customize search result limits and behavior
Plugin management and configuration
Extensive keyboard shortcuts (15+ shortcuts)

footer.gettingStarted: Press Ctrl+Space to open Volt anytime. Start typing to search for apps, files, or commands. Press Ctrl+, to open settings.
footer.feedback: Have feedback or found a bug? Visit our GitHub repository to report issues or request features.
